---
title: GPU-accelerated Python
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{layout="[[12], [4, 4, 4]]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[A few notes about GPUs](gpu_intro.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Arrays with &nbsp;![](img/icon_cupy.png){width="1.3em"}](gpu_cupy.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[![](img/logo_polars.png){width="2.3em"}&nbsp; on GPU](gpu_cudf.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Arrays & AD with ![](img/logo_jax.png){width="1.6em"}](hpc_jax.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::
